name: Asana
shortDescription: A comprehensive project management integration that enables automated task creation, project management, and team collaboration workflows. This extension provides full control over Asana workspaces, projects, tasks, and team communication through automated processes.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a new task in an Asana project with customizable properties like due dates, assignees, and tags. Perfect for automating task creation workflows and project management processes.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Updates an existing Asana task with new information such as due dates, assignees, status, or content. Perfect for automating task management and progress tracking workflows.

actions.name: Get Task by ID
actions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific task including its title, description, assignee, due date, and current status.

actions.name: Find Task in Project
actions.description: Searches for a task within a specific project by name. Returns the first exact match or a task with similar name.

actions.name: Add Task to Section
actions.description: Adds a task to a specific section of a project. This method is used to move tasks into sections.

actions.name: Attach File
actions.description: Attaches a file to an Asana task for easy access and collaboration. Supports documents, images, and other file types up to 100MB.

actions.name: Add Comment
actions.description: Adds a comment to a task for communication and updates. Comments help team members collaborate and track progress on tasks.

actions.name: Duplicate Task
actions.description: Creates a copy of an existing task with customizable properties. Useful for creating similar tasks or templates without starting from scratch.

actions.name: Create Subtask
actions.description: Creates a smaller task within a parent task to break down complex work into manageable pieces.

actions.name: Get Task Templates
actions.description: Retrieves the compact task template records for certain project.

actions.name: Create Task from Template
actions.description: Creates a new task from a selected template.

actions.name: Create Project
actions.description: Creates a new Asana project to organize tasks and collaborate with team members. Projects help structure work and track progress toward goals.

actions.name: Find Project by Name
actions.description: Searches for a project within a workspace by name. Returns the first exact match or a project with similar name.

actions.name: Create Project from Template
actions.description: Creates a new project from a custom template.

actions.name: Create Section
actions.description: Creates a new section within a project.

actions.name: Get Section by ID
actions.description: Retrieves full section record by its ID.

actions.name: Find User by email or ID
actions.description: Retrieves a User by email or ID.

idealUseCases: Automating task creation and assignment based on external triggers
Building AI agents for project management and workflow optimization
Creating automated project templates and task standardization systems
Managing team collaboration with automated comment and file attachment workflows
Implementing custom task tracking and progress monitoring systems
Building integrated project management dashboards and reporting tools
Automating project planning and resource allocation processes
